emails.subject: C of A
emails.body: C of A Who will/can sign the turbine contract for Enron? Thanks, Kay

emails.subject: RE: C of A
emails.body: RE: C of A Probably Ben Jacoby. Let me veryify this with Jeff Keenan. Thanks, Eric To: Booth, Eric

emails.body: It is too big for Ben. Maybe Dave Duran? To: Booth, Eric

emails.subject: RE: C of A
emails.body: That sounds good to me, especially considering that this project is just about ready to be turned over to the desk. To: Booth, Eric
